# Stage 7 Fixture Verdicts

These examples are contract fixtures, not product app reviews.

## Wine List

Lane: Customer-Facing Hospitality

Verdict: PASS_WITH_NOTES

Reason: the wine list is primary, style filters are visible, and help-me-choose is a secondary action. Cellar/admin notes are not dumped on first load.

## Manager Brief

Lane: Manager-Facing Operations

Verdict: PASS

Reason: today, status, priority, and one next action appear first. Setup, history, and exports are secondary.

## Analytical Model

Lane: Analytical Software

Verdict: PASS_WITH_NOTES

Reason: recommendation, confidence, and key drivers appear first. Formula receipts are reachable from a secondary audit trail.

## Personal Productivity

Lane: Personal Productivity

Verdict: PASS

Reason: now, next, capture, and undo are visible without forcing setup first.

## Overloaded First Screen

Lane: Customer-Facing Hospitality

Verdict: FAIL_OVERLOADED

Reason: first screen shows a full list, helper wizard, staff notes, vendor export, admin edit controls, pricing matrix, and marketing sections at once.

## Taste Gate After Deterministic Pass

Lane: Local Business Website

Verdict: NEEDS_TASTE_REVIEW

Reason: build/runtime/product hierarchy pass, but final brand mood, imagery, and owner voice are subjective.
